message:
fix(insert): restrict column-list INSERT fast path to full-column specifications only

The direct INSERT fast path previously attempted to handle partial
column lists by filling unspecified columns with NULL. This could
produce incorrect results when the omitted columns have DEFAULT
constraints or are computed — the VDBE path handles these correctly.

Restrict the fast path to only fire when the INSERT column list
specifies ALL table columns (just potentially reordered). When
fewer columns are specified than exist in the table, or the column
count doesn't match the VALUES count, fall through to the VDBE
path which handles defaults and computed columns properly.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update bd-wwqen.2 and bd-wwqen.3 issue comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
